variants.short_description: Whether they're just starting out or already love the water, the Arena pool set is the perfect companion for all of the aquatic endeavors of any young swimmers.
variants.detailed_description:
Take the plunge into the pool with the Arena junior pool set - the ultimate swim companion for young fitness enthusiasts! This set features the Classic Silicone swim cap and the Bubble 3 Junior goggles, crafted with the utmost care and attention to detail to provide a comfortable and enjoyable swimming experience. The soft silicone seal of the goggles forms a snug fit around the eyes, while the adjustable nose bridge and single strap ensure a secure and stable fit. With anti-fog coating and UV protection 400, your young swimmer can see clearly underwater, no matter how long they stay in the pool. And, with the reinforced edge of the swim cap and its soft and elastic silicone fabric, they'll never have to worry about the cap riding up or causing discomfort. Whether they're just starting out or already have a love for the water, the Arena junior pool set is the perfect choice for all their aquatic adventures!
The anti-fog coating and UV protection 400 on the goggles are also nice features that can help improve visibility and protect the eyes from harmful UV rays. Additionally, the fact that the goggles are PVC-free is a good environmental consideration.

The swim cap has some great features, including protecting the hair from chlorine and reducing drag. The reinforced edge helps keep the cap in place during swims, and the soft and elastic silicone fabric provides a comfortable fit.

Overall, this set of arena goggles and swim cap seems well-suited for fitness swimmers who want a comfortable, secure, and protective swim experience.
variants.detailed_specification:
Material: 100% silicone, PVC-free
Surface: Wrinkle-free
Fit: Junior Size, snug and comfortable fit
Performance: Soft Silicone seal,adjustable nose bridge, suitable for fitness swimmers
Care: Wash in fresh water after use, air dry away from heat sources
Gender: Suitable for both boys and girls.

This the set of arena Zoom X-Fit goggles and Classic Silicone swim cap is a great choice for fitness swimmers! The soft silicone seal provides a comfortable fit, and the adjustable nose bridge and split strap helps ensure a secure fit for swimmers with different head shapes and hair lengths.

The anti-fog coating and UV protection 400 on the goggles are also nice features that can help improve visibility and protect the eyes from harmful UV rays. Additionally, the fact that the goggles are PVC-free is a good environmental consideration.

The swim cap has some great features, including protecting the hair from chlorine and reducing drag. The reinforced edge helps keep the cap in place during swims, and the soft and elastic silicone fabric provides a comfortable fit.

Overall, this set of arena goggles and swim cap seems well-suited for fitness swimmers who want a comfortable, secure, and protective swim experience.

variants.short_description: Arena 365 Mirror Swimming Goggles are ideal for year-round fitness swimming, offering a comfortable leak-free fit, wide vision, and mirror lenses to reduce glare—perfect for indoor and outdoor pools.
variants.detailed_description:
The Arena 365 Mirror Swimming Goggles are designed for swimmers who train regularly and demand comfort, durability, and clear vision. Built specifically for fitness and lap swimming, these goggles feature a lightweight yet sturdy construction that performs reliably throughout the year.

The soft rubber frame and seals sit comfortably around the eyes, ensuring a secure, leak-free fit even during long swim sessions. The large lenses provide excellent forward and peripheral vision, helping swimmers stay aware of their surroundings in busy pools.

Equipped with mirrored lenses, the Arena 365 goggles effectively reduce glare, making them suitable for both indoor pools and outdoor swimming under bright light conditions. A perfect choice for fitness swimmers in India looking for dependable performance, comfort, and eye protection in every swim.

variants.detailed_description:
Introducing Air Bold Swipe Mirror Fitness Goggles, where comfort meets innovation. These goggles seamlessly blend the adaptable Air Seals honeycomb design with Swipe anti-fog technology, promising a transformative experience for fitness swimmers. The compressible design ensures a feather-light feel, eliminating discomfort and allowing an undistracted focus on your swim.

Swipe anti-fog technology provides 10 times longer clear vision than other solutions, with a simple swipe across the inner lens. Tested by elite swimmers, the technology that made our Cobra-racing goggles legendary is now tailored for fitness swimming, ensuring proven excellence in every swim.

Dive into the next evolution of fitness swim gear with Air Bold Swipe Mirror, a companion redefining your water experience with comfort, clarity, and style. Upgrade your swim gear to the pinnacle of innovation and embrace a new era of fitness swimming with Air Bold Swipe Mirror Fitness Goggles.

Experience clear, comfortable swimming with the Arena The One Plus Mirror Swimming Goggles, Made in Italy and designed for swimmers who train regularly and value reliability.

Built with precision-shaped seals, these goggles adjust naturally to most face profiles, offering a stable, watertight seal without causing pressure or discomfort. The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable fit, even during extended fitness sessions.

Featuring enhanced anti-fog technology that lasts twice as long, The One Plus Mirror delivers consistent clarity lap after lap. The mirrored lenses help minimise glare, making these goggles especially suitable for outdoor pools and brightly lit indoor swimming environments in India.

With an easy-to-adjust strap system and durable construction, the Arena The One Plus Mirror combines Italian craftsmanship with everyday performance, making it a dependable choice for fitness swimmers seeking comfort, clarity, and confidence in the water.

These goggles seamlessly blend the adaptable Air Seals honeycomb design with Swipe anti-fog technology, promising a transformative experience for fitness swimmers. Swipe anti-fog technology provides 10 times longer clear vision than other solutions, with a simple swipe across the inner lens. Tested by elite swimmers, the technology that made our Cobra-racing goggles legendary is now tailored for fitness swimming, ensuring proven excellence in every swim.

Dive into the next evolution of fitness swim gear with Air Bold Swipe Mirror, a companion redefining your water experience with comfort, clarity, and style. Upgrade your swim gear to the pinnacle of innovation and embrace a new era of fitness swimming with Air Bold Swipe Mirror Fitness Goggles.
